mapper.select: SELECT code, sort_order, label FROM renewal_period ORDER BY sort_order, code
SELECT d.tenant_type, d.period, d.price, d.updated_at FROM domain_list_fee_price d INNER JOIN renewal_period r ON r.code = d.period ORDER BY d.tenant_type, r.sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO domain_list_fee_price (tenant_type, period, price) SELECT tt.tenant_type, rp.code, 0 FROM ( SELECT 'GROUP' AS tenant_type UNION ALL SELECT 'COMPANY' ) AS tt CROSS JOIN renewal_period AS rp

INSERT INTO domain_list_fee_price (tenant_type, period, price, updated_at) VALUES
( #{item.tenantType, typeHandler=com.eazycount.handler.TenantTypeHandler}, #{item.period}, #{item.price}, NOW() )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE price = VALUES(price), updated_at = NOW()
